headline: Stryker Expands Peripheral Vascular Reach With Amplitude Deal And Undervalued Shares
summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) has agreed to acquire Amplitude Vascular Systems. The deal adds hydraulic intravascular lithotripsy technology aimed at treating calcified peripheral arterial disease. The transaction is intended to expand Stryker's peripheral vascular portfolio and support its medical technology focus. Stryker, trading at around $313.5, is using this acquisition to build out its peripheral vascular offerings at a time when calcified peripheral arterial disease remains a difficult area of...
